name: blossom-server
description: A content-addressed blob storage server implementing the [Blossom](https://github.com/hzrd149/blossom) protocol. Files are stored and retrieved by their SHA-256 hash. Built with [Deno 2](https://deno.com), [Hono](https://hono.dev), and [LibSQL](https://turso.tech/libsql).
